title: Push zone
description: Add push zone to your world, where you don't want players to go
body:
A simple mod that adds a Push zone block. This block will push players away from it, preventing them from passing. However, mobs, projectiles, and items will still be able to pass through this area.

To get whis block, take it from operators items or enter the command

```
/give @p push_zone:push_zone
```


You're free to use this mode anywhere, but don't show it like it's you're work
